raw.transcript: [{"timestamp":7005,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"この日程表は、令和 8 年度の学校行事と教育委員会の訪問スケジュールを一覧化し、訪問時のタイムテーブルと助言体制を具体的に示しています。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260417_004009_bc8bafa8.jpg","mark_id":"f406f05e030a7d605d83527070031221","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260417004010-mark@7a7ac2cc57dd183cbe6b27.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1776386394_7005.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":17504,"mark_type":3,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"水野の学校園訪問は、稲美北中5/27（水）、天満小6/16(火)、加古小6/26（火）のみ参加","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":null,"mark_id":null,"ocr_data_link":null,"link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":null,"picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":true,"mark_status":null,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null}]
